working_on: Patch the routine-mode harness permission allowlist gap surfaced when the first manual routine fire (post-S-0045 master plan) deadlocked at the very first Bash invocation (python3 engine/tools/check_target.py) waiting for a permission approval that never came. Extend .claude/settings.json permissions.allow with the routine procedure's complete Bash command surface (engine python tools, git lifecycle on the worktree, gh issue create/list, supabase db push for Phase 5 task execution). Add a 'Harness permission allowlist' subsection to engine/operations/routine-mode-operations.md documenting the every-new-bash-needs-allowlist rule. Clean up the stale untracked engine/session/current.json debris in this worktree (S-0044 close artifact).
declared_scope: S-0046 — routine-mode harness permission allowlist patch. Tactical engine-apparatus session. Scope: (1) extend .claude/settings.json permissions.allow with patterns for python3 engine/tools/{check_target,check_routine_scope,scan_context_telemetry,audit_handoff_dispositions,validate,scan_issue_backlog,scan_issue_collisions,scan_orphans}.py:*, plus worktree-side git add/commit/rm/mv/status/diff/log/rev-parse/fetch/show/pull, plus gh issue create/list/view, plus date :*, plus supabase db push:* (Phase 5 task execution); (2) add 'Harness permission allowlist' subsection to engine/operations/routine-mode-operations.md after the existing 'Mixing interactive and routine sessions' section, documenting the rule that adding a new Bash invocation to the routine procedure REQUIRES a paired allowlist entry in the same commit; (3) delete the stale untracked engine/session/current.json (S-0044 payload re-surfaced post-close, blocks clean working-tree state). Out of scope: Phase 5 substantive work (executes via routine after this patch lands), settings.local.json edits (user-scope, not project-scope), update-config skill flow (direct edit is simpler given the well-defined surface). phase: NA-engine-apparatus.
